---
name: "💬 Chat (Default)"
about: "Quick chat with the AI — no tools, saves API quota. Works perfectly with Groq free tier."
labels: []
---

Type your message below. The AI will respond directly without using tools — perfect for quick questions.

This is the **default mode** — you can also just open a regular issue without any label and it will use chat mode automatically.

Uses ~500 tokens per message (vs ~120,000 for agent mode), so it works great with Groq's free tier (12K TPM).

---
